title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 100.590 - Authority may assume projects of constitutional charter cities, when
text:
100.590.  Authority may assume projects of constitutional charter cities, when. — Any authority empowered to undertake and carry out projects in a constitutional charter city under this law is hereby authorized to and may, upon such terms and conditions as it may determine not inconsistent with this law, and with the consent of the governing body of such constitutional charter city, contract to and take over, assume, continue and carry out all undertakings, obligations, rights, powers, plans and activities, not inconsistent with this law, of such constitutional charter city relating to planned or existing projects for industrial development.
(L. 1967 p. 172 § 30)
